steps: Confirm subject line + first line strategy
Confirm body structure (value prop, case study, CTA)
Output final copy with variants and follow-ups

first_line_strategies.name: Problem Sniffing
first_line_strategies.when: Strong audit data, rankings, or observable gaps
first_line_strategies.example: I asked ChatGPT [keyword] and you ranked 15th behind [competitors]...

first_line_strategies.name: Billboard
first_line_strategies.when: Limited data but clear, compelling offer
first_line_strategies.example: We help customers reach their entire TAM every two months.

first_line_strategies.name: Signal-Led
first_line_strategies.when: Recent news, hiring, funding, or product launch
first_line_strategies.example: Post-raise, pipeline velocity matters. Part of that now starts with AI search.

production_case_studies.strategy: News type maps to buyer-behavior opener, not 'Saw the headline'
production_case_studies.proof: Live AI citation check in col 14-26

production_case_studies.strategy: Whole-offer subject lines for VP Engineering and CTO personas
production_case_studies.proof: $180K ARR in 6 months on greenfield stack

production_case_studies.strategy: 80 posts/week with 6-check gate before CMS (not after)
production_case_studies.proof: 0.96 similarity caught pre-publish on sample corpus
